title: Ryazan、Ryazan Oblast — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Ryazan、Ryazan Oblast的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Ryazan是Ryazan Oblast的一個城市，人口約540,000。A historic city southeast of Moscow, known for its magnificent Kremlin, the Ryazan Museum of Long-Range Aviation, and traditional crafts.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
